# Transtrack UI

## Installation

1. Pastikan project adalah project yang menggunakan Nuxt JS (3).
2. Sudah terinstal Tailwind CSS pada project.

```bash
npm install transtrack-ui
```

After installation, initialize the library in your project:

```bash
npx transtrack-ui init
```

## Adding Components

You can add individual components to your project using:

```bash
npx transtrack-ui add [component-name]
```

Example:

```bash
npx transtrack-ui add Button
```

You can also add icons:

```bash
npx transtrack-ui add AlertTriangle
```

## Components & Icons

For detailed documentation and visual examples of each component, visit our Storybook documentation.


## Usage

### Import

If auto-import doesn't work, you can manually import components:

```vue
<template>
  <Button 
    color="primary" 
    :disabled="false" 
    id="button-1" 
    label="Click me" 
    :loading="false" 
    type="button" 
  />
</template>

<script setup>
import Button from "~/components/general/Button/index.vue";
</script>
```

atau menggunakan auto-import:

```vue
<template>
  <GeneralButton
    color="primary"
    :disabled="false"
    id="button-1"
    label="Click me"
    :loading="false"
    type="button"
  />
</template>
```

## Component Examples

### Button

Flexible button component with various states and styles.

```vue
<template>
  <!-- Primary Button -->
  <Button color="primary" label="Primary Button" />
  
  <!-- Secondary Button -->
  <Button color="secondary" label="Secondary Button" />
  
  <!-- Loading State -->
  <Button color="primary" label="Loading..." :loading="true" />
  
  <!-- Disabled State -->
  <Button color="primary" label="Disabled" :disabled="true" />
  
  <!-- With Icon -->
  <Button color="primary" label="Save">
    <template #icon>
      <SaveIcon />
    </template>
  </Button>
</template>
```
